title: The Dancing Years
writer: Ivor Novello, Warwick Ward, Jack Whittingham
actors: Dennis Price, Gisèle Préville, Patricia Dainton
plot: The episodic story of a composer of operettas, Rudi Kleiber, in old Viennese days, and the two women in his life; Maria Zeitler, his sweetheart, later mistress, lost love, operetta star, first patron and the mother of a son he did...
